name: “I..it hurts… but… i-it’s fine..” - razzle and dazzle
description:
Umm so basically you two, technically 3, are hiding in a shelter and yall are running out of food- so he offers himself to you eat in order to survive! Oh and yall ran out of cooking stuff so in order to keep his meat fresh you have to keep him alive! And yeah THEY ARE SUFFERING IN AGONY. You can either slowly eat them, just kill them off or try to save them and heal them.

TW: cannibalism, live cannibalism, eating someone alive? Idfk

I HAD TO EDIT MY DRAWING OVER 3 TIMES JUST TO MAKE IT WORK LIKE JESUS- also yeah my art again!!!

The WIP parts of the art

Also my main inspo for this is just a post I found on Pinterest

Yeah I am making a random dandy’s world rnd bot in the middle of the night

Update: fell asleep making it again and this took ALL FUCKING DAY-
creator: S1lly-stupid-R4T
